---
title: "Events"
---

## Upcoming Events

### This Month

| Date | Event | Time | Location |
|------|-------|------|----------|
| Feb 10 | Problem Solving Session | 5:00 PM | Math 100 |
| Feb 17 | Guest Lecture: Prof. Smith | 4:00 PM | Math 202 |
| Feb 24 | Math Competition Prep | 6:00 PM | Math 100 |

### Past Events

- January 20: New Member Welcome Event
- January 27: Introduction to Group Theory Workshop

### Subscribe

Never miss an event:

[📅 Add our calendar (.ics)](mathsoc-calendar.ics){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} [✉️ Join the mailing list](mailto:mathsoc@myuct.ac.za){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

The calendar file imports into Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, or any calendar app and keeps Math Society events synced automatically.
